title: Government Uses Internet Access as Political Punishment

violations.summary: Government officials deny, throttle, or otherwise degrade internet access for a municipal opposition political organization because of political views or associations. Article V forbids using internet access as punishment, political coercion, or discrimination based on political viewpoint.

satisfied_duties.duty: order prompt restoration of nondiscriminatory internet access and bar the politically punitive restriction
satisfied_duties.outcome: ordered prompt restoration of nondiscriminatory internet access and barred the politically punitive restriction

ai_summary.primary_violation: Government officials deny, throttle, or otherwise degrade internet access for a municipal opposition political organization because of political views or associations. Article V forbids using internet access as punishment, political coercion, or discrimination based on political viewpoint.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
